name: Insta360 X4 Selfie Stick Sleeve
description:
Selfie Stick Sleeve does not interfere with the use of the 1/4" screw interface on the bottom cover of the selfie stick.
For scenarios where the selfie stick is not handheld, it is recommended to remove the Selfie Stick Sleeve, as this will provide a better invisible effect in videos

features.Key Features: Compatibility : X4, ACE PRO, ACE, GO3, X3, ONE RS 1-Inch 360 Edition, ONE RS (Twin/4K,) GO2, ONE X2, ONE R, ONE X | Comfortable silicone grip for easier handling of your selfie stick, making shooting easier. | Ergonomically designed spindle shape for easier grip over extended periods. | Slide the sleeve on from the top of the selfie stick (1/4" screw side). To remove, simply pull from the same direction in an upward motion.
